title: Putin heads to Beijing days after Trump in test of China's balancing act
summary_full: Beijing walks into the summit with the stronger hand while Moscow seeks reassurance that China has not drifted toward Washington after Trump's visit.
summary_public: Beijing walks into the summit with the stronger hand while Moscow seeks reassurance that China has not drifted toward Washington after Trump's visit.

RU.label: neutral
RU.evidence: Moscow seeks reassurance that China has not drifted
